name: blender-pro
description: Professional Blender workflow plugin for Codex. Bundles expert skills, references, and MCP configuration for scene creation, procedural modeling, Geometry Nodes, asset pipelines, materials, lighting, rendering, animation, rigging, bpy workflows, troubleshooting, and quality review.

interface.longDescription: Use Codex as a professional Blender assistant for scene creation, procedural modeling, Geometry Nodes, asset pipelines, materials, lighting, rendering, animation, rigging, bpy workflows, troubleshooting, and final quality review. Includes bundled Blender MCP configuration, focused skills, reference playbooks, safety rules, and marketplace assets.
defaultPrompt: Use Blender Pro to inspect my current Blender scene through MCP and produce a safe improvement plan before changing anything.
Use Blender Pro to build a clean, named, organized Blender scene with materials, lighting, camera, and render settings.
Use Blender Pro to plan a bpy workflow, explain the scene changes, then apply them only in small reversible batches.
Use Blender Pro to create or improve a Geometry Nodes setup and document the exposed parameters.
Use Blender Pro to review my scene for scale, topology, naming, materials, lighting, camera composition, render readiness, and handoff quality.
